title: OBR more structures
description: Openworld BattleRoyale Datapack: Increase overworld structure generation
body:
This data pack is custom-made for Openworld BattleRoyale modpack.

## Key Modifications
- Only modifies structures found in the **Overworld**.
- Increases the generation frequency of **villages**.
- Increases the generation frequency of non-village structures like Ruined Portals and Shipwrecks.
- Increases the generation frequency of rare structures such as Jungle Temples and Woodland Mansions.
- Structures like Desert Temples and Ruined Portals have a chance to be replaced by villages upon generation.

This data pack is designed to work with custom battle royale mods, where structures default to using chests/barrels as loot spawn points. Based on the number of chests provided and their generation frequency, structures are categorized into three types:

### Wild Zones
Small resupply points encountered along the way, not intended as primary resource acquisition methods.

- Key Characteristics: Wide generation spread, low resources.
- Typical Structures: Ruined Portal, Shipwreck.
> Scavengers can't compete with city folk.

### Urban Zones
Resource-dense areas with abundant cover.

- Key Characteristics: Concentrated resources, plenty of cover.
- Typical Structures: Village.
> Iron Golem: Take another look behind you.

### Mansion
Single structures with concentrated resources.

- Key Characteristics: Centralized resources, spawns only in specific biomes.
- Typical Structures: Woodland Mansion.
> Instant Loot Spree!
